sections.instruction: Questions 1-3: Choose the correct letter A-D. Questions 4-7: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 8 and 9: Circle TWO letters from A-G. Question 10: Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for the answer.

questions.content: How much is the beginner’s course?
What does the club insurance cover?
How do the girls want to travel?
Which TWO of the following items must people take with them?
Which TWO accommodation options mentioned are near the paragliding school?
Which weekend do the girls decide to go? {{BLANK}}

sections.instruction: Questions 11-13: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 14 and 15: Choose the correct letter A-C. Questions 16-18: Circle THREE letters A-F. Questions 19 and 20: Circle TWO letters A-F.

questions.content: What took Alan by surprise?
options: B the main feature of the park

questions.content: How did Alan feel about having to wait in the park because of rain?
options: B he was irritated by the rain
C it made no difference to his enjoyment

questions.content: What does Alan say about those who helped him?
options: A there were no other campers nearby
B they willingly helped in the search
C they kept our spirits up
D they provided some dry clothes
E the park ranger was unable to get through
F the helicopter pilot led the search very well

questions.content: What does Alan say about the discoveries on the wall?
options: A he took photos of them
B they could be clearly seen
E they proved to be ancient

sections.instruction: Question 21-25: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 26-30: Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: What is Sally’s study strategy in lectures? {{BLANK}}
What is Ben’s study strategy for reading? {{BLANK}}
What is the subject of Ben’s first lecture? {{BLANK}}
What is the title of Ben’s first tutorial paper? {{BLANK}}
What is the subject of Sally’s first tutorial paper? {{BLANK}}

sections.instruction: Questions 31-35: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 36-40: Complete the table below. Write the appropriate letters A-G next to questions 36-40.

questions.content: Type of job
options: A a job requiring an unspecified degree
B working with people who are ill
E a housewife with time on her hands
G a career in an insurance office
